title: COLLATE operator masked by function calls
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci, value INT);
SELECT 'abc' = (name CONCAT '') FROM test_table WHERE value = 1;
SELECT 'abc' = (name CONCAT UPPER('')) FROM test_table WHERE value = 2;
key_bug_features: COLLATE operator masked by upper() function calls
